landing.heroSub: Echo connects you with trained peer listeners — anonymously, for free.
landing.step01Desc: Share as much or as little as you need. No forms, no intake.
landing.step02: Get matched with a trained Listener.
landing.step02Desc: Echo pairs you based on availability and training level.
landing.step03Desc: Your Listener is there to hear you — nothing more, nothing less.
landing.formationDesc: Echo Listeners complete a rigorous training called The Formation — a multi-step program including readings, quizzes, and a live simulation with an AI test conversation.
landing.trust1: Not a crisis line. For emergencies, call your local services.
landing.trust2: Not therapy. Listeners are trained volunteers, not clinicians.
landing.trust3: Not a social network. Sessions are private and do not persist.

dashboard.noOneWaiting: No one is waiting right now.
dashboard.noSessionsYet: No sessions yet. Your first one is waiting.
dashboard.bottomNotice: ● Echo is peer support only. Listeners are trained volunteers, not clinicians. For emergencies, contact your local crisis services.

chat.listenerShortly: A trained Listener will be with you shortly.
chat.talkToAuraWhileWaiting: While you wait, you can talk to Aura.
chat.guideline1: Be honest, but kind. This is a safe space.
chat.guideline2: Listeners don't give advice. They listen.
chat.guideline3: Sessions are private and not stored.
chat.guideline4: Echo is not a crisis service. For emergencies, contact local services.
chat.thankYouListening: Thank you for listening. Take a moment for yourself.
chat.crisisNotice: If you or someone you know is in immediate danger, please contact emergency services or a crisis line.
chat.blockConfirm: Block this user? This will flag the session for admin review.
chat.languageBanner: This Seeker may be writing in {{language}}. Echo Advisor can help you respond.

aura.disclaimer1: Aura is an AI assistant, not a human, not a therapist, and not a crisis service.
aura.disclaimer2: Aura can listen and reflect — nothing more. If you are in danger, call emergency services now.
aura.connectPrompt: We've talked for a while. Would you like to connect with a human Echo Listener? Sometimes talking to another person makes all the difference.
aura.crisisPaused: Aura has paused this conversation. Please contact a crisis service.
aura.errorResponse: I'm having trouble responding right now. Please try again.

advisor.title: ● Echo Advisor
advisor.getHelp: Get an AI-powered suggestion for your next response.

queue.title: Listener Queue
queue.heading: Someone needs you.
queue.waitingCount: ● {{count}} people waiting. Select from the top for priority.
queue.waitingCountSingle: ● 1 person waiting. Select from the top for priority.
queue.noOneWaiting: No one is waiting right now. Check back soon.

formation.title: Formation
formation.welcomeBody1: There are many people with no one to talk to. As an Echo Listener, you will help create a safe space for people to share what's happening in their lives, anonymously and for free.
formation.welcomeBody2: This formation takes approximately 60 minutes. Your progress is saved automatically.
formation.welcomeScoring: There are 23 questions. You have 2 attempts per question. You need at least 33 of 46 points to unlock the Simulation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.chatBgDesc: Upload an image to use as a subtle background in your chat sessions.
settings.notifySub: Receive an email when a new seeker is waiting.
settings.deleteWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be removed.
settings.supportPlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
settings.ticketSent: Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you.
settings.faqSub: Coming soon — we're building our knowledge base.

step1.title: Basic Info
step1.heading: Tell us about yourself.
step1.ageGate: I am 18 years of age or older
step1.ageGateWarning: Listeners under 18 require verified parental consent. This feature is coming soon.

step2.title: Your Profile
step2.heading: Make it yours.
step2.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself. No links to other platforms, no contact info, no inappropriate language.

step3.title: Topics
step3.heading: Your comfort zones.
step3.avoid: Topics I prefer not to discuss
step3.lived: Topics I have direct lived experience with

step4.title: Languages
step4.heading: What languages do you speak?
step4.missingLanguage: Don't see your language? We can add it. Submit a support ticket after completing registration.

step5.title: Verify
step5.heading: Almost there.
step5.checkSafety: I confirm I am not homicidal, suicidal, or an abuser of others.
step5.checkPeerSupport: I understand Echo is peer support, not therapy. I will not provide medical or clinical advice.
step5.checkTerms: I agree to Echo's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

welcome.heading: Welcome to Echo.
welcome.body: You're almost ready. Before your first session, you must complete The Formation — Echo's listener training. It takes approximately 60 minutes. Your progress is saved. You can stop and return anytime.

auth.resetDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetSent: Check your email for a reset link.
auth.roleSeekerDesc: Connect with a trained listener anonymously.
auth.roleListenerDesc: Help others by lending your ear and empathy.

common.removedViolation: You've been removed from this room for violating community guidelines.
